tasks.title: Clerk Auth Integration
tasks.description: Replace admin-secret with proper Clerk authentication for /admin/* routes. Includes login page, middleware protection, role-based access, and session management.

tasks.title: Automation Pipeline
tasks.description: Build the cursor.com/automations suite for lgportfolio, including Builder, CI Fixer, Spec Reviewer, E2E Verifier, and Gatekeeper automations. The PRD serves as the spec.

tasks.title: PR Template
tasks.description: Create .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md with changelog section, test verification checklist, and CUJ mapping checklist for every PR.

tasks.title: Dark Mode Toggle
tasks.description: Add a persisted dark/light mode toggle with system-default detection, localStorage preference, and smooth CSS transitions across all pages.

tasks.title: Blog RSS Feed
tasks.description: Auto-generate an RSS/Atom feed from src/content/posts/ markdown files. Expose at /writing/feed.xml or similar discoverable URL.

tasks.title: SEO Audit
tasks.description: Audit and fix meta tags, Open Graph tags, Twitter cards, structured data (JSON-LD), and canonical URLs across all public pages for better search visibility.

tasks.title: Chat History UI
tasks.description: Add an in-chat history panel that displays past recruiter chat sessions stored in Firestore, allowing users to revisit or continue previous conversations.

tasks.title: Contact form
tasks.description: Build a serverless contact form that sends emails via Resend API. Include validation, rate limiting, and spam protection (Turnstile or similar). Source: PRD.md P3 Backlog.

tasks.title: Project case studies
tasks.description: Create detailed per-project pages with problem/solution/impact framing, architecture diagrams, tech stack badges, and links to live demos or repos. Source: PRD.md P3 Backlog.

tasks.title: War Room alerting
tasks.description: Add Slack/Discord webhook notifications when error spikes are detected. Include error rate thresholds, cooldown period, and mute controls. Source: PRD.md P3 Backlog.

tasks.title: Performance budget with Lighthouse CI
tasks.description: Set up Lighthouse CI in GitHub Actions. Define performance budgets (LCP < 2.5s, TBT < 200ms, CLS < 0.1) and fail CI on regressions. Source: PRD.md P3 Backlog.

tasks.title: Fix lgportfolio deployment pipeline — last deploy failed
tasks.description: The latest production deployment for lgportfolio on Vercel failed. Check the Vercel dashboard for details.

tasks.title: Update README with autonomous pipeline docs
tasks.description: Document the CI/CD pipeline, automation workflows, and autonomous operation flows in the README so contributors and AI agents understand how the repo's pipeline works.

tasks.title: Set up release control (CHANGELOG, versioning, GitHub Releases)
tasks.description: Establish semantic versioning, maintain a CHANGELOG.md following Keep a Changelog, and configure GitHub Releases workflow for tagged releases.

tasks.title: Fix lgportfolio metrics endpoint — /api/metrics not responding
tasks.description: The Prometheus metrics endpoint at https://gimenez.dev/api/metrics is not responding. Repair instrumentation.

tasks.title: Add Grafana alert rules for lgportfolio
tasks.description: Grafana dashboard 'Portfolio War Room' exists but has no alert rules. Add: high error rate, latency spike, service down.

tasks.title: Send custom GA4 events for key actions
tasks.description: GA4 loaded but no custom events sent. Add: project_view, resume_download, contact_form_submit, external_link_click. Success: GA4 dashboard shows project engagement.

tasks.title: Set up A/B testing infrastructure (Vercel Flags / LaunchDarkly)
tasks.description: Without A/B testing, design changes are subjective. Set up feature flags to test button placement, color schemes, and layout changes against real user behavior.

tasks.title: Site-wide health monitoring with auto-redeploy
tasks.description: gimenez.dev has no health checks. Every page needs monitoring: GET each public page every 15min, verify 200 + title loads. On failure: auto-redeploy via `vercel --prod`. On repeated failure: alert to Telegram. Pages to monitor: /, /projects, /resume, /war-room, /admin/*, and any new routes added. Also check that embedded resources load (Prometheus/Grafana panels on war-room, images, fonts). This is the SAME pattern as parrish-local and churnistic health checkers, just missing for lgportfolio.

tasks.title: Fix lgportfolio Vercel deploy
tasks.description: Latest production deploy failed.

tasks.title: Remove stuck Vercel preview deployment check
tasks.description: Vercel GitHub integration creates a preview deployment check named 'rmgpgab-lgportfolio-us-east1-menezmethod-lgportfolio--maxmo' that gets stuck in 'Queued - Waiting to run' state on PRs. This check is NOT required by branch protection (only lint-build-test and cypress are required), but it clutters PR status. Fix: disable Vercel status checks in GitHub repo settings → Integrations → Vercel, or in Vercel dashboard → Project → Git → uncheck 'Create deployment status'.
